headline: Cisco Reimagines Security for the Agentic Workforce
summary: RSA CONFERENCE 2026 -- Cisco (NASDAQ: CSCO) today announced significant security innovations designed for the agentic AI ecosystem, where software no longer just answers questions—it acts. At RSA Conference 2026, Cisco is introducing solutions to address AI security issues and remove a top barrier to agent adoption.
